name: Mindful TMS Neurocare - Bangalore
description_long: Mindful TMS, an initiative by Rangsons (part of NR Group), is the first chain of super-specialized TMS Neurocare centers in India. They take a holistic approach to treating mental illnesses with TMS at the core, customizing unique programs that include meditation, yoga, and other relevant treatments. With 5+ years of rTMS experience and 10+ clinics across India and USA, Mindful TMS offers safe, medication-free rTMS treatment for depression, anxiety, and OCD.
address: 704, 2nd Floor, ASN Signature, Varthur Road, Palm Meadows, Siddapura, Whitefield

doctors_data.name: Dr. Naveen Jayaram
doctors_data.title: Founder & Chief Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Naveen Jayaram received his MD in Psychiatry from NIMHANS in 2012. He has received the Young Scientist Award from the World Association of Biological Psychiatry in 2011 and Best Resident Award from NIMHANS in 2012. He specializes in stress management, de-addiction, and rTMS therapy.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Abhishek Nagakumar
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Consultant Psychiatrist at Mindful TMS Neurocare Bangalore specializing in rTMS-based treatment for mood and anxiety disorders.

name: Mindful TMS Neurocare - Delhi
description_long: Mindful TMS Neurocare's Delhi center located in Greater Kailash offers safe, medication-free rTMS treatment for depression, anxiety, and OCD. As part of the Mindful TMS chain, the first super-specialized TMS Neurocare centers in India, the Delhi branch provides holistic mental healthcare combining rTMS with therapy, assessments, and neurofeedback.
address: S-35, First Floor, Greater Kailash-1, Masjid Moth, Greater Kailash

name: MindBrain TMS Institute
description_long: MindBrain is a leading Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation provider in Delhi founded by Dr. Anuranjan Bist, a USA-trained Board-Certified Psychiatrist. The institute integrates TMS and Ketamine therapy with holistic approaches for treating depression, anxiety, OCD, and other mental health conditions. Located opposite AIIMS Trauma Centre in Safdarjung Enclave, MindBrain offers pioneering single-day TMS treatment protocols.
address: A-1/288, First Floor, Safdarjung Enclave

doctors_data.name: Dr. Anuranjan Bist
doctors_data.title: Founder & CEO, Board-Certified Psychiatrist
doctors_data.qualifications: MBBS (University of Mumbai), MPH (University of South Carolina), MD (Brookdale University Hospital, New York), Diplomate of American Board of Psychiatry and Neurology
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Anuranjan Bist is a USA-trained Board-Certified Psychiatrist who practiced in the USA for 18 years before opening MindBrain Institute in India. He has redefined therapeutic approaches by integrating TMS and Ketamine therapy with yoga techniques. He is the author of 'Beyond the Brain' and recipient of the Chief Residents Award (2006).
doctors_data.university: University of Mumbai / Brookdale University Hospital, New York

name: EHSAAS - Centre for Comprehensive Psychiatric Care
description_long: EHSAAS (meaning 'Heal a Little Everyday') is a comprehensive psychiatric care center in South Delhi founded by Dr. Manish Sarkar, an elite alumnus of NIMHANS. The clinic specializes in rTMS therapy along with pharmacological management of psychiatric disorders including substance dependence, adult psychiatric disorders, and child and geriatric psychiatric disorders.
address: J-1976, C.R. Park

doctors_data.name: Dr. Manish Sarkar
doctors_data.title: Founder & Senior Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Manish Sarkar is an elite alumnus of NIMHANS, Bangalore. With around 19 years of experience, he specializes in administering rTMS therapy and pharmacological management of all types of psychiatric disorders. He is an expert in substance dependence disorders, adult psychiatric disorders, and child and geriatric psychiatric care.

name: Asha Neuromodulation Clinic (ANC) - Gachibowli
description_long: Asha Neuromodulation Clinic (ANC) is India's leading neuromodulation center, specializing in advanced non-invasive brain stimulation therapies including rTMS, Deep TMS, tDCS, and biofeedback. ANC is one of the only institutions in India to use the advanced Brainsway Deep TMS system and TMS with Neuronavigation. With 40+ qualified psychiatrists and psychologists, ANC provides comprehensive mental health care across multiple locations in Hyderabad.
address: 4th Floor, Fantasy Square Building, Biodiversity Circle, Jayabheri Pine Valley, Gachibowli

doctors_data.name: Dr. M.S. Reddy
doctors_data.title: Senior Psychiatrist & Director
doctors_data.qualifications: MBBS (S.V. Medical College, Tirupati, 1978), DPM (Christian Medical College, Vellore, 1982), MD Psychiatry (Christian Medical College, Vellore, 1984)
doctors_data.bio: Dr. M.S. Reddy is a senior psychiatrist with 45+ years of experience specializing in bipolar disorder, depression, OCD, and mood disorders. He pioneered the multi-centered clinical use of Deep TMS technology for treating psychiatric disorders in India. He is the Director of Asha Bipolar Clinic and a leading thought leader in mental healthcare in India.
doctors_data.university: S.V. Medical College, Tirupati / Christian Medical College, Vellore

doctors_data.name: Dr. Chytanya Deepak
doctors_data.title: Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Consultant Psychiatrist at Asha Neuromodulation Clinic specializing in neuromodulation therapies and comprehensive mental health care.

doctors_data.name: Dr. S. Swetha Reddy
doctors_data.title: Women's Mental Health Specialist
doctors_data.bio: Specialist in women's mental health at Asha Hospital, providing psychiatric care with focus on perinatal and reproductive psychiatry.

name: TransMag Well-Being Clinic
description_long: TransMag Well-Being Clinic is a pioneering rTMS center in Mumbai founded by Dr. Shamsah Sonawalla, an internationally renowned psychiatrist who specialized in Repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation at Harvard. Established in 2010, TransMag was among the first dedicated rTMS clinics in India, offering state-of-the-art, safe, and effective treatment for depression and other clinical conditions.
address: Vasant, 1st Floor #6, Opposite Activity School, Peddar Road

doctors_data.name: Dr. Shamsah Sonawalla
doctors_data.title: Founder & Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.qualifications: MBBS, MD Psychiatry (Bombay University / T.N. Medical College & B.Y.L. Nair Hospital), Postdoctoral Training (Harvard), Former Assistant Professor of Psychiatry (Harvard)
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Shamsah Sonawalla is an internationally renowned psychiatrist, author, and researcher with over 22 years of clinical and research experience across India and the United States. She completed her postdoctoral training at Harvard and specialized in rTMS for psychiatric disorders in 2008. She is also Associate Director of Psychiatry Research and Consultant Psychiatrist at Jaslok Hospital and Research Center, Mumbai. She has over 100 publications in leading journals including the American Journal of Psychiatry.

name: NIMHANS - Department of Psychiatry
description_long: The National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro Sciences (NIMHANS) is India's premier institution for mental health and neuroscience research and treatment, located in Bangalore. NIMHANS conducted the first randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial of rTMS to treat depression in India. The Department of Psychiatry offers rTMS therapy as part of its comprehensive psychiatric services.
address: Hosur Road, Marigowda Road, Lakkasandra, Wilson Garden

doctors_data.name: Dr. Shyam Sundar A
doctors_data.title: Associate Professor, Department of Psychiatry
doctors_data.bio: Associate Professor in the Department of Psychiatry at NIMHANS with specialized interest in repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation (rTMS) and its applications for OCD and depression treatment.

name: Cadabams Hospitals
description_long: Cadabams Hospitals is a leading psychiatric hospital in Bangalore offering multidisciplinary team care including psychiatrists, psychologists, social workers, nurses, and rehab therapists. They provide evidence-based care including CBT, ECT, rTMS, and neurofeedback across 8 specialty centers. With advanced in-house rTMS equipment, Cadabams offers expert rTMS treatment for depression, anxiety, bipolar disorder, and chronic pain.
address: No. 280, 15th Cross, 5th Phase, JP Nagar

doctors_data.name: Dr. Madhukar BR
doctors_data.title: Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Senior Consultant Psychiatrist at Cadabams Hospitals with expertise in rTMS therapy, mood disorders, and comprehensive psychiatric care.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Vishal Kasal
doctors_data.title: Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Consultant Psychiatrist at Cadabams Hospitals specializing in evidence-based psychiatric treatments including rTMS, CBT, and pharmacotherapy.

name: Somnos rTMS Clinic
description_long: Somnos rTMS Clinic in Kolkata provides the latest US FDA-approved rTMS treatment for resistant depression and OCD at affordable costs. Founded by Dr. Sourav Das, the clinic offers cutting-edge, cost-effective, and empathetic treatment for a range of mental health issues. rTMS sessions are priced between Rs. 1,650 to Rs. 1,950 per session, making advanced neuromodulation therapy accessible in Eastern India.
address: Ground & First Floor, 14B, Selimpur Road, Dhakuria E Rd, beside Bank of India Quarters, Selimpur

doctors_data.name: Dr. Sourav Das
doctors_data.title: Founder & Senior Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Sourav Das is a senior consultant psychiatrist and addiction medicine and sleep medicine specialist. He founded Somnos rTMS Clinic to provide affordable, cutting-edge rTMS treatment for resistant depression and OCD in Kolkata and Eastern India.

name: Institute of Mental Health (IMH) - Neurostimulation Service
description_long: The Institute of Mental Health (IMH) has the largest psychiatric rTMS service in Singapore, offering TMS treatment since 2015 for patients with treatment-resistant depression under its Neurostimulation Service. IMH is currently conducting pioneering clinical trials (APIC-TMS and SPARK-D) in collaboration with NUS Medicine to study personalised TMS for treatment-resistant depression, making Singapore the first country in Southeast Asia to conduct such trials.
address: 10 Buangkok View, Buangkok Green Medical Park

doctors_data.name: Dr. Tor Phern Chern
doctors_data.title: Senior Consultant & Head of Neurostimulation Service
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Tor Phern Chern is a Senior Consultant in the Department of Mood & Anxiety and Head of Neurostimulation Service at IMH. He is a certified clinical TMS practitioner and teaching faculty for the College of Psychiatry TMS course in Singapore. He gained proficiency in advanced neurostimulation at Black Dog Institute (Sydney) and Toronto Western Hospital (Canada). He chairs the Singapore ECT and Neurostimulation Society and serves as treasurer for the International Society of Neurostimulation. He is the Principal Investigator for the APIC-TMS and SPARK-D clinical trials.
doctors_data.university: NUS / Black Dog Institute (Sydney) / Toronto Western Hospital

name: Promises Healthcare
description_long: Promises Healthcare is Singapore's premier private mental health treatment center and the only private provider of TMS therapy in Singapore. Founded in 2011 by Dr. Munidasa Winslow, a pioneer in addiction medicine in the Asia-Pacific region, the center offers NeuroStar TMS Therapy along with psychotherapy, counseling, couples therapy, creative therapies, psychodrama, and specialized addiction therapy. Located at Novena Medical Center, the multidisciplinary team includes psychiatrists, psychologists, therapists, and executive coaches.
address: #09-22/23, Novena Medical Center, 10 Sinaran Drive

doctors_data.name: Dr. Munidasa Winslow
doctors_data.title: Founder & Senior Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Munidasa Winslow founded Promises Healthcare in 2011 and is renowned internationally as an expert in addiction and impulse control disorders. Before founding Promises, he served as Chief of the Addiction Medicine Department at the Institute of Mental Health (IMH). He has worked in general psychiatry and addiction medicine at IMH since 1988 and is a pioneer in addiction and impulse control disorders in the Asia-Pacific region.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Sean David Vanniasingham
doctors_data.title: Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.qualifications: MBBS (NUS), MRCPsych (Royal College of Psychiatrists, UK)
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Sean David Vanniasingham is a consultant psychiatrist experienced in general psychiatry, addiction medicine, and neurostimulation treatment. He graduated from the National University of Singapore and attained his post-graduate degree from the Royal College of Psychiatrists. He previously practiced at IMH and the National Addictions Management Service (NAMS).
doctors_data.university: National University of Singapore / Royal College of Psychiatrists, UK

name: Khoo Teck Puat Hospital (KTPH) - Psychological Medicine
description_long: Khoo Teck Puat Hospital (KTPH) offers TMS therapy through its Department of Psychological Medicine. The department provides comprehensive assessment and management of mental health conditions with a multidisciplinary team of psychiatrists and case managers. KTPH accepts external referrals for rTMS from psychiatrists across both public and private healthcare institutions. The TMS service is supervised by trained TMS nurses working under psychiatrist oversight.
address: 90 Yishun Central

name: National University Hospital (NUH) - Psychological Medicine
description_long: The Department of Psychological Medicine at the National University Hospital (NUH) provides specialized psychiatric services including neuromodulation therapies. NUH's Yong Loo Lin School of Medicine collaborates with IMH on groundbreaking personalised TMS research for treatment-resistant depression. The department offers comprehensive mental health programs and specialized services.
address: 5 Lower Kent Ridge Road

name: Gleneagles Hospital - Dr. Christopher Chan
description_long: Gleneagles Hospital in Singapore offers rTMS therapy through Dr. Christopher Chan Yi Wen, a psychiatrist specializing in the management and treatment of mood disorders with experience in repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation. The hospital, part of Parkway Pantai, is one of Singapore's leading private hospitals providing comprehensive psychiatric care.
address: 6A Napier Road

doctors_data.name: Dr. Christopher Chan Yi Wen
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Christopher Chan is a psychiatrist practicing at Gleneagles Hospital (Mount Elizabeth Novena) who specializes in the management and treatment of mood disorders with experience in repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation (rTMS).

name: Private Space Medical - Novena Specialist Center
description_long: Private Space Medical is a psychiatric clinic located at Novena Specialist Center in Singapore. Their psychiatrists and therapists have experience working in renowned hospitals including Singapore General Hospital (SGH) and KK Women's and Children's Hospital (KKH), offering comprehensive mental health services in a private, comfortable setting.
address: #05-21, Novena Specialist Center, 8 Sinaran Drive

name: German Neuroscience Center
description_long: The German Neuroscience Center is the leading center for TMS in Dubai with nearly 20 years of experience providing cutting-edge neurological, psychiatric, and psychological therapies. With three branches across Dubai (Healthcare City, Jumeirah Lake Towers, and Business Bay), the center employs TMS-certified specialists who evaluate patients' medical histories and symptoms to determine optimal TMS treatment protocols. The center is staffed by internationally trained neurologists, psychiatrists, and psychologists.
address: Dubai Healthcare City, Building 64, Al Razi, Block A, 2006

additional_locations.name: GNC - Jumeirah Lake Towers
additional_locations.address: Jumeirah Lake Towers, Cluster I, Platinum Tower 2806, Dubai

additional_locations.name: GNC - Business Bay
additional_locations.address: Business Bay, Bayview Tower 1701, Marasi Drive, Dubai

doctors_data.name: Prof. Dr. Peter Rieckmann
doctors_data.title: Consultant Neurologist
doctors_data.bio: Senior neurologist at the German Neuroscience Center with extensive experience in neurology and neuromodulation therapies.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Harry Horgan
doctors_data.title: Clinical Psychologist
doctors_data.qualifications: MSc Health Psychology (University of Ulster, Ireland), DClinPsy (University of East London, UK)
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Harry Horgan is a UK-trained Clinical Psychologist with work experience across diverse mental health and specialist psychology services in Ireland and the United Kingdom.
doctors_data.university: University of Ulster / University of East London

name: Novomed Mental Health (NovOMind)
description_long: Novomed is one of the leading medical centres offering transcranial magnetic stimulation (TMS) in Dubai, Abu Dhabi, and Al Ain. Their NovOMind Mental Health division provides a safe, well-tailored, and non-invasive TMS procedure performed by eminent psychiatry and psychology specialists. The center treats both adults and children for all types of mental health conditions.
address: Marina Plaza, 30th Floor, Al Marsa Street, Dubai Marina

doctors_data.name: Dr. Hanan Hussein
doctors_data.title: Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Consultant Psychiatrist at Novomed Mental Health specializing in comprehensive psychiatric assessment and TMS therapy for mood disorders and treatment-resistant conditions.

name: American Wellness Center - Dubai Healthcare City
description_long: The American Wellness Center in Dubai Healthcare City offers advanced TMS therapy with state-of-the-art machinery and equipment. Their board-certified psychiatrists specialize in anxiety and mood disorders, with multidisciplinary collaboration between psychiatrists, psychologists, and wellness specialists. TMS sessions typically last 30 to 40 minutes with no sedation required. The center offers TMS combined with psychotherapy for enhanced outcomes.
address: Dubai Healthcare City

name: Emirates Hospital Clinic - Dubai Marina (The London Psychiatry Centre)
description_long: Emirates Hospital Clinic in Dubai Marina, in partnership with The London Psychiatry Centre, has introduced the first repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (rTMS) based liaison service in the world. The London Psychiatry Centre was the first clinic in the UK to offer rTMS treatment. Their rTMS therapy has shown a 61-66% remission rate, significantly outperforming other dTMS providers.
address: Al Habtoor Business Tower, Dubai Marina

doctors_data.name: Dr. Andy Zamar
doctors_data.title: Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Andy Zamar is a renowned psychiatrist from The London Psychiatry Centre who offers expert psychiatric services at the Emirates Hospital Dubai Marina clinic. He is a pioneer of rTMS treatment in the UK and focuses on innovative, evidence-based treatments for mental wellness.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Tina Temelkovska
doctors_data.title: Specialist Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Tina Temelkovska is a respected psychiatrist at Emirates Hospitals Group in Dubai specializing in CBT, EMDR therapy, transcranial current stimulation (tCS), and VR therapy. She provides comprehensive diagnoses and personalized treatment plans for various mental health conditions.

name: Openminds Psychiatry, Counselling & Neuroscience Centre
description_long: Openminds Psychiatry, Counselling & Neuroscience Centre in Dubai offers Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS) therapy as a non-invasive, drug-free treatment that helps activate underactive areas of the brain linked to mood, motivation, and emotional balance. Located in The One Tower, Tecom, the center is led by Medical Director Dr. Sankara Sreenivas Kuchibatla and provides comprehensive psychiatric, psychological, and neuroscience services.
address: The One Tower, Suite 904-905, Tecom, Al Barsha

doctors_data.name: Dr. Sankara Sreenivas Kuchibatla
doctors_data.title: Medical Director & Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Sankara Sreenivas Kuchibatla is the Medical Director and Consultant Psychiatrist at Openminds Centre, Dubai. He leads the clinic's comprehensive psychiatric and neuroscience services including TMS therapy, QEEG assessment, and neurofeedback.

name: Mediclinic Deira
description_long: Mediclinic Deira is a state-of-the-art medical facility in Dubai offering TMS therapy for depression through its psychiatry department. Located in the City Centre Deira offices building adjacent to the Pullman Hotel, the clinic provides multispecialty outpatient care with expert physicians, experienced nursing staff, and on-site diagnostic imaging and pharmacy.
address: City Centre Deira Offices Building, Port Saeed

doctors_data.name: Dr. Abdulrazek Saiyed
doctors_data.title: Specialist Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Abdulrazek Saiyed is a Specialist Psychiatrist at Mediclinic Deira providing TMS therapy for depression along with comprehensive psychiatric care.

name: Aspris Wellbeing Centre (formerly Priory Wellbeing Centre)
description_long: Aspris Wellbeing Centre (formerly known as Priory Wellbeing Centre) is a state-of-the-art mental health clinic in Dubai's City Walk area. The centre is staffed by psychiatrists, psychologists, and counsellors led by Dr. Rasha Bassim, a qualified TMS therapist since 2014. Aspris offers comprehensive mental health treatment from anxiety and depression to more complex conditions, with locations in Dubai and Abu Dhabi.
address: City Walk, Al Wasl and Al Safa Road Junction

doctors_data.name: Dr. Rasha Bassim
doctors_data.title: Lead Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.qualifications: MD, Specialist in Psychiatry, Qualified TMS Therapist (2014)
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Rasha Bassim is the lead consultant psychiatrist at Aspris Wellbeing Centre Dubai. She is a qualified transcranial magnetic stimulation (TMS) therapist since 2014 and leads the multidisciplinary team of psychiatrists, psychologists, and counsellors at the centre.

name: Beautiful Mind Medical Center (BMMC)
description_long: Beautiful Mind Medical Center (BMMC) is a premier mental health facility in Abu Dhabi founded in 2018 by Dr. Abdulnaser Arida, a distinguished consultant psychiatrist with over 25 years of experience. The center offers expert psychiatry, psychology, and TMS therapy using the state-of-the-art MagVenture system. TMS effectively addresses depression, OCD, anxiety, and addiction at BMMC.
address: Sultan Bin Zayed The First Street, Al Muntazah, Zone 1

doctors_data.name: Dr. Abdulnaser Arida
doctors_data.title: Founder & Consultant Psychiatrist
doctors_data.qualifications: MD (University of Aleppo, Syria), Arab Board of Medical Specialization in Psychiatry, Member of American Psychiatric Association
doctors_data.bio: Dr. Abdulnaser Arida is a distinguished consultant psychiatrist with over 25 years of expertise. He previously served as Head of the Adult General Psychiatry Clinic at Sheikh Khalifa Medical City (SKMC) in Abu Dhabi, where he led undergraduate medical training and CME programs. He founded Beautiful Mind Medical Center in 2018 to provide comprehensive, evidence-based psychiatric care.
